_comment: S.I.N.A Tools Registry — external utility tool definitions

tools.name: Ollama
tools.description: Local LLM runtime. Required for AI features.

tools.name: Docker
tools.description: Container runtime for supporting services (tile server, ChromaDB).

tools.name: Node.js 20+
tools.description: JavaScript runtime required for S.I.N.A backend and frontend.
tools.install_command: curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash - && sudo apt-get install -y nodejs
